category_title: Students with autism using typed communication and requiring extended processing time
minimal_context: Shaffer is sitting in the front row during a whole-class science lecture where the teacher is asking questions.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the next question for our science lecture.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits silently in the front row staring straight ahead, tapping his thumbs together.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Shaffer, you know this one. Raise your hand.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Keeps his hand at his side while four other students shoot their hands quickly in the air.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Alright, I will call on one of the other students with their hand raised.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Raises his left hand slowly as the other student begins to give her answer.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the next question for our science lecture.

STUDENT: (Sits silently in the front row staring straight ahead, tapping his thumbs together.)

TUTOR: Shaffer, you know this one. Raise your hand.

STUDENT: (Keeps his hand at his side while four other students shoot their hands quickly in the air.)

TUTOR: Alright, I will call on one of the other students with their hand raised.

STUDENT: (Raises his left hand slowly as the other student begins to give her answer.)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: four other students shot their hands quickly in the air

behavior_patterns.condition: The teacher called on one of the students with her hand raised and as she began to give her answer
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Shaffer raised his left hand slowly
